_comment: Swell (chainId 1923) L1 addresses. Swell has been removed from the public superchain-registry (ethereum-optimism/superchain-registry#1247) as it winds down, so this file is the fallback for SuperchainAddressRegistry. Addresses verified with op-fetcher against SystemConfigProxy 0xD3d4c6B703978a5d24FecF3a70a51127667Ff1A4 and L1StandardBridgeProxy 0x7aA4960908B13D104bf056B23E2C76B43c5AACc8. The chain reuses OP Mainnet's standard SuperchainConfig (0x95703e0982140D16f8ebA6d158FccEde42f04a4C). ProxyAdminOwner is the current (pre-transfer) owner — the standard OP Mainnet L1PAO.
